channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Saturday and Sunday parking, 6th June
item.description:
This issue has been ongoing for a year. Businesses and the public have been using Frampton park road, specifically zone D to leave their cars and visit the frampton park church and mare street leaving us with no parking when there’s no enforement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frampton Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath is obstructed- reported numerous times, 6th June
item.description:
The footpath is obstructed due to excess vegetation from 180 Queensbridge road's garden. This means you have to walk onto cycle path to pass and there is a lampost dircetly in the way. This makes the likelihood of a collision with cyclists highly likely.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen branch, 6th June
item.description:
Wind damage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): FP125, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tag on rear of sign, 6th June
item.description:
Tag on rear of car park direction sign On central island Code S25
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kentish Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac manhole unstable, 6th June
item.description:
Dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain still blocked - 2nd report, 6th June
item.description:
Reported before but still blocked. Large ponding affecting pedestrians on path and at crossing. This is after rain. The drain opposite is ok. Blocked pipe?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Widmore Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter problem worsening Osbaldeston road, 6th June
item.description:
Litter by some residents (no 33 and no 24 worse offenders) no respect for the road of other residents . Disgusting

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter fly tipping worsening Osbaldeston road Stoke Newington common end, 6th June
item.description:
Litter fly tipping by residents on Osbaldeston road is worsening by the week, with litter, mattresses, clothes left in recycling bags all over the road. Outside no 33 and 24 problematic as well as the bottom of the road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter problem worsening Osbaldeston road Stoke Newington common side, 6th June
item.description:
The increase in litter, fly tipping, mattresses left out on Osbaldeston Road is becoming increasingly problematic. As usual outside no 24 bins overflow, rubbish left everywhere with no respect for neighbours or the residents on the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Young tree leaning badly, 6th June
item.description:
Stabilising posts for young tree are not fixed in sufficiently and are falling. Wind has blown the tree to one side, and snapped stabilising straps.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car left for years used as a shed, 6th June
item.description:
Car has flat tyres using a resident parking bay and being used as storage

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fuchsia Street, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing rubbish under the arch in Nine Elms, 6th June
item.description:
Overflowing wheely bins between USA Embassy and Nine Elms Station under the arch 42 next to the New Covent Garden Market

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arch 42, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: East Kydbrooke is blocked where the stream passes into a culvert, 6th June
item.description:
Rain has brought down leave litter and sticks, which have blocked the stream and will cause flooding

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodcote Drive, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped chair on Elcot Avenue, 6th June
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Elcot Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree outside 53 Samos Rd and 5m further towards Marlow Rd SE20, 6th June
item.description:
The tree outside 53 Samos Rd SE20 requires the low branches growing out of the bottom to be pruned The large tree a further 5m towards Marlow Rd SE20 requires pruning. The low hanging branches are a health & safety hazard to pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samos Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unkept property vegetation sprawling over public footpath, 6th June
item.description:
I reported this under 9369974 and you’ve closed it saying you’ve notified the appropriate address and to allow 28 days from 28th April. You’ve either notified the wrong door or they’ve not adhered to you request As you can see, it’s not done .. how have you not issued them with a section 215? The property not only looks grim - it’s a hazard for anyone that has walking difficulties or would breach equality’s act 2010. You cannot get a pram or wheelchair through without brambles/nettles impacting a face/body and is more than 1/2 over the public footpath - this needs serious investigation. You can’t miss the property - over 5 derelict vehicles and a boat plus smashed windows . Please get this sorted asap considering you’ve cordoned off the closest pedestrian island, passersby cannot cross westmoreland road safely to avoid the hazardous bushes. Do better

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Westmoreland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley, 6th June
item.description:
Abandoned trolley in queens gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lownds Court, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 19 southlands grove, maybe, 6th June
item.description:
Not sure if the flats own the bush or the house next to it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southlands Grove, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bird poo and damaging tree sap, 6th June
item.description:
We pay for expensive parking and everyday we pay for expensive carwashes to not ruin our cars, the trees over hang the road and just today a branch has broken and dented my car. Please cut these trees back opposite 23,25,27,29 Cobourg Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobourg Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair flytipped on commercial way, 6th June
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Commercial Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
